race.description: Hollydene Estate Wines Showcase Bm 58 Handicap
race.comment: GRANDINI (4) ready to peak fourth-up and placed at this trip. Savaged the line with a tidy fourth over 1600m at Scone. Will drift back again and launch late with the senior rider going on. KAHRABA (5) got the prize two back at Port Macquarie over 1812m. Couldn't follow that up last time when a battling seventh over 2000m at Hawkesbury in BM64 grade. Comes back a level and expected to bounce back. DIPIERDOMENICO (2) capable on his day and strips fitter second-up. Motored late with a sound fifth over the mile at Scone. Returned good figures on that occasion and maps well. KEINBAH'S WARRIOR (7) progressive gelding heading in the right direction after scoring a smart win over the mile at his second race start in C1 grade. Respect.
